features: Firmer Loofah - The loofah on a stick adopts special reinforcement and knotting technology, which greatly enhances the firmness and durability of the connection between the luffas and the handle, so the loofah won't easily fall off the handle.

Friendly to Sensitive Skin - The loofah with handle is made of soft and flexible material, which can gently cleanse the most sensitive skin, improving circulation and skin health, allowing you to enjoy the bath time.

Perfect Foaming Effect - The loofah sponge with handle has dense and fluffy meshes, which can create rich fine foam with only little body wash. With the body shower loofah scrubber gently massages to leave you with smoother, softer and younger-looking skin.

Durable Wooden Handle - The long wooden handle of the loofah is extremely durable and will not split or crack with prolonged use, which can be easy to reach places like your back and lower legs, the cotton lanyard on the handle can help you hang to dry the back loofah brush after use.

Perfect After-Sale Service - We are so confident in the quality of the luffa on a stick that you will love them. Any unsatisfied, please contact us, we will offer an unconditional replacement or refund. We sincerely hope that the RASDDER bath brush are working well for you. Just buy it now.
description: Product description loofah Directions 1. Wet the loofah sponge with water. 2. Apply a small amount of body wash to the loofah. 3. Gently massage your skin in a circular motion. 4. Rinse off the lather and pat your skin dry. 5. Hang the loofah brush to dry using the cotton lanyard. Safety Warning Follow general safety practices for bathing sponges, such as cleaning and drying after each use to prevent bacterial growth. See more
